title: Color Box
description: The Color Box component is a tool for selecting and displaying colors, featuring a popover color palette and support for disabled/readonly states.

sections.title: Using Decorators
sections.description: You can use decorators like `ax-prefix` and `ax-suffix`.

sections.title: Read-only
sections.description: You can make `ax-color-box` readonly using the `readonly` property.

sections.title: Disabled
sections.description: You can disable `ax-color-box` using the `disabled` property.

sections.title: Clear behavior
sections.description: Demonstrates clear button, resetting to null, and placeholder rendering.

sections.title: Visual toggles
sections.description: Toggle badge, value text, and icon visibility with signals.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the color box.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Makes the component read-only. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual validation state. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name associated with the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes with details. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires when the component gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when look changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown opens. Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown closes. Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Emitted on key down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Emitted on key up. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Emitted on key press. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onTextChanged
events.description: Emitted when the typed text changes. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles the dropdown if not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Switches between open and closed states.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Opens the dropdown if it is not already open and not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The dropdown becomes open and receives focus.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the dropdown if it is open and not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The dropdown is closed and focus returns to the host.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Sets focus on the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
focus(): void
